main_metric: Peak month revenue and category revenue share
recommendation: Prioritize high-impact categories before demand peaks.

main_metric: Revenue, AOV, orders per customer, bounce rate
recommendation: Allocate channel spend based on revenue quality, AOV, repeat behavior, and traffic quality.

main_metric: Return rate, return records, refund amount
recommendation: Improve sizing guidance for high-return size-category groups.

main_metric: Average rating by delivery delay bucket
recommendation: Use proactive communication or shipping priority for delay-risk orders.

main_metric: Stockout days, fill rate, lost sales proxy
recommendation: Increase safety stock and earlier reorder triggers for high-demand stockout categories.
Rebalance inventory within categories: replenish winners, markdown or pause slow movers.
